title: correorchis cylindrostachya
intro: Correorchis cylindrostachya, also known as the cylindrical spike orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of orchid native to the tropical forests of Papua New Guinea. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Correorchis cylindrostachya is used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for its health benefits.
